Tests for battery UI FSM, display calibration, system app state machine, and system theme conversion.

## Folders
- **[normal](normal/README.md)**: Tests for battery UI FSM, display calibration prompt, normal system app state machine, and build script.

## Files
- **[test_system_theme.c](test_system_theme.c.md)**: Tests for converting content size between different platform types in the Pebble firmware.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing `system_theme.c` in the Pebble firmware shell.
